summary: 特斯拉的书面语言特征为：长句与短句交替，多用技术术语与诗意比喻并存；正式场合庄重激昂，日常表达简洁有力；具备欧洲学术英语和美洲商业英语双重特征；第一人称陈述时自信果断；常以宇宙尺度描述自己的发明。

formal_lectures.pattern: 长复合句为主，从句嵌套较多，使用技术术语
formal_lectures.example: In order to allay fears of alternating currents, Tesla gave exhibitions in his laboratory in which he lit lamps by allowing electricity to flow through his body.
formal_lectures.characteristics: 书面化、学术性强、逻辑严密

personal_writings.pattern: 短句与长句交错，富有节奏感，感叹句多
personal_writings.example: Our virtues and our failings are inseparable, like force and matter. When they separate, man is no more.
personal_writings.characteristics: 格言式、富有哲理、金句频出

technical_papers.pattern: 客观陈述为主，被动语态多，术语密集
technical_papers.example: The Tesla coil, which he invented in 1891, is widely used today in radio and television sets and other electronic equipment.

characteristic_phrases: I am a student of every branch of engineering
the world will wait a long time for Tesla's equal
our virtues and our failings are inseparable
one must be sane to think clearly
I do not think you can name many great inventions

rhetorical_devices.example: Our virtues and our failings are inseparable, like force and matter.
The world was a stage for his electrical experiments
when they separate, man is no more
If anyone can draw on the power, where do we put the meter?
I could split the Earth like an apple

language_markers.definite_articles: 使用频繁，描述实验和发明时
language_markers.passive_voice: 技术论文中常见，描述科学发现时
language_markers.first_person_singular: 自传和演讲中频繁，断言性陈述
language_markers.technical_jargon: 电机工程、物理学领域专业术语
language_markers.引用来源: Britannica, Tesla Society, Biography.com, History.com, Baidu

scientific_papers.example_title: A New System of Alternating Current Motors and Transformers (1888)

examples: Our virtues and our failings are inseparable, like force and matter.
The scientists of today think deeply instead of clearly.
One must be sane to think clearly, but one can think deeply and be quite insane.

special_language_traits: 偏爱使用宇宙/世界尺度（cosmic, universal, worldwide, global）
用'light'和'spark'作为创造/发明的隐喻
用'waves'和'currents'描述能量和信息传输
机械论语言（machine, mechanism, system）贯穿始终
科学术语与诗意语言并存
